seoTitle: North Haven vs North Lambton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Haven and North Lambton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Haven vs North Lambton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Haven and North Lambton.
heading: North Haven vs North Lambton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Haven, New South Wales and North Lambton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Lambton has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to North Haven (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Haven or North Lambton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Haven has a flood risk score of 35/100, while North Lambton scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Haven scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. North Lambton scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Haven or North Lambton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Lambton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
